message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

class Library {
    + books : ArrayList<Book>
    + persons : ArrayList<Person>
    + borrowings : ArrayList<Borrowing>
    + standardBorrowingPeriod : int
    + library : Library
    + addBook(book : Book) : void
    + addPerson(person : Person) : void
    + addBorrowing(borrowing : Borrowing) : void
    + addBooks(books : ArrayList<Book>) : void
    + addPersons(persons : ArrayList<Person>) : void
    + addBorrowings(borrowings : ArrayList<Borrowing>) : void
    + getBook() : ArrayList<Book>
    + getPerson() : ArrayList<Person>
    + getPersonBySurname(surname : Person) : ArrayList<Person>
    + getPersonByNameAndSurname(person : Person) : ArrayList<Penalty>
    + penalizePerson(person : Person, penalty : Penalty) : void
    + getBorrowing() : ArrayList<Borrowing>
    + getAllBorrowingsThatAreDueOrOverdue() : ArrayList<Borrowing>
    + returnBook(book : Book) : boolean
    + extendBorrowing(borrowing : Borrowing) : void
    + returnBookAndEndBorrowing(borrowing : Borrowing) : void
    + borrowBookToPerson(person : Person, book : Book) : void
}

class DateTime {
    - daysInMonths : int[]
    - day : int
    - month : EMonth
    - year : int
    - hour : int
    - minutes : int
    - seconds : int
    + DateTime(day : int, month : EMonth, year : int)
    + DateTime(day : int, month : int, year : int)
    + DateTime(day : int, month : EMonth, year : int, hours : int, minutes : int, seconds : int)
    + DateTime(day : int, month : int, year : int, hours : int, minutes : int, seconds : int)
    + getDay() : int
    + getMonth() : EMonth
    + getYear() : int
    + getHour() : int
    + getMinutes() : int
    + getSeconds() : int
    + setDay(day : int) : void
    + setMonth(month : EMonth) : void
    + setMonth(month : int) : void
    + setYear(year : int) : void
    + setHour(hour : int) : void
    + setMinutes(minutes : int) : void
    + setSeconds(seconds : int) : void
    + addDays(days : int) : void
    + getDaysTimeInSecondsSince1970() : double
    + copy() : DateTime
    + toString() : String
}

class Borrowing {
    - id : int
    - book : Book
    - person : Person
    - borrowed_since : DateTime
    - borrowed_until : DateTime
    + Borrowing(id : int, book : Book, person : Person, borrowed_since : DateTime, borrowed_until : DateTime)
    + getId() : int
    + getBook() : Book
    + getPerson() : Person
    + getBorrowedSince() : DateTime
    + getBorrowedUntil() : void
    + setBorrowedUntil(dt : void)
    + toString() : String
}

class EMonth {
    <<enumeration>>
    + JANUARY
    + FEBRUARY
    + MARCH
    + APRIL
    + MAY
    + JUNE
    + JULY
    + AUGUST
    + SEPTEMBER
    + OCTOBER
    + NOVEMBER
    + DECEMBER
    + getMonthNameFromMonth(m : Month) : int static
    + getEMonthFromIntMonth(m : int) : EMonth static
}

class Book {
    - author : Person
    - title : String
    - publisher : String
    - isbn : String
    + Book(author : Person, title : String, publisher : String, isbn : String)
    + getAuthor() : Person
    + getTitle() : String
    + getPublisher() : String
    + getISBN() : String
    + toString() : String
}

class Person {
    - name : String
    - surname : String
    - phone_numbers : ArrayList<Integer>
    - emails : ArrayList<String>
    - penalties : ArrayList<Penalty>
    + Person(name : String, surname : String)
    + Person(name : String, surname : String, phone_number : int)
    + Person(name : String, surname : String, phone_number : int, email : String)
    + getName() : String
    + getSurname() : String
    + getPhoneNumbers() : ArrayList<Integer>
    + getEmails() : ArrayList<String>
    + getPhoneNumber(n) : ArrayList<Integer>
    + getPenalties() : ArrayList<Penalty>
    + setNname(name : String) : void
    + setSurname(surname : String) : void
    + addPhoneNumber(phone_number : int) : void
    + addPhoneNumbers(phone_numbers : ArrayList<Integer>) : void
    + addEmail(email : String) : void
    + addEmails(emails : ArrayList<String>) : void
    + addPenalty(penalty : Penalty) : void
    + toString() : String
}

class Penalty {
    - Description : String
    - PenaltyDescription : String
    - getDebtorsperson() : String
    - isExtingu() : String
}

class IDSingleton {
    <<interface>>
    + instance : IDSingleton static
    + ICCounter : int static
    + IDSingleton()
    + getInstance() : IDSingleton static
    + getId() : int
}

Library -- "books" > Book
Library -- "persons" > Person
Library -- "borrowings" > Borrowing
DateTime -- EMonth
Borrowing -- DateTime
Borrowing -- Book
Borrowing -- Person
Book -- Person
Person -- Penalty
IDSingleton ..> IDSingleton

@enduml
```
